## 🚨 INCIDENT REPORT

### Incident Details
- **Incident ID**: INC-YYYY-MM-DD-XXX
- **Start Time**: <!-- When did the incident start (UTC) -->
- **Detection Time**: <!-- When was the incident detected (UTC) -->
- **Reporter**: <!-- Who reported the incident -->
- **Severity**: 
  - [ ] SEV1 (Critical - Total service outage)
  - [ ] SEV2 (High - Major functionality down)
  - [ ] SEV3 (Medium - Partial functionality affected)
  - [ ] SEV4 (Low - Minor impact)
